---
title: "MeshOperator"
generated: true
description: "A sparse mesh / graph operator in either supported storage format."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.sparse._apply`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MeshOperator -->
```python
MeshOperator = Union[ELL, SectionedELL]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:MeshOperator -->
A sparse mesh / graph operator in either supported storage format.

The union of the two sparse operator layouts consumed by
[`apply_operator`](../nitrix-sparse/apply_operator.qmd): a flat [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell/ELL.qmd) (near-uniform vertex degree) or a
bucketed [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/SectionedELL.qmd) (irregular valence).  Surface-algorithm code
accepts this alias so it can remain agnostic to the underlying storage format.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
